cover.era_chip: 朝鮮 後期 · 實學
cover.subtitle:
성리학을 넘어,
실생활을 향한 학문.
cover.imagePrompt: Late Joseon dynasty 18th century scholar's study illustration. Foreground: a Korean scholar (Jeong Yak-yong style) in white dopo robe, seated cross-legged at a low desk with brush and ink stone, writing on paper. On the desk: open Korean classical books, an abacus, a measuring compass. Background: a window with bamboo silhouette and rolled scrolls. Color: warm sepia + ink-black + soft amber. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 정제두, 양명학 강화학파 형성. 지행합일 강조.

items.title: 북학파 등장
items.desc: 청 문물 수용 주장, 직업적 평등 강조.

items.title: 사회 비판
items.desc: 양반 사회의 한계와 신분제 문제 제기.

outro.tip_headline:
"중농 = 토지 / 중상 = 상공업"
학파를 한 단어로 잡을 것.
outro.tip_body: 심화 시험은 학자별 저서와 주장(유형원-반계수록-균전론, 이익-성호사설-한전론, 정약용-목민심서-정전제)을 정확히 매칭하는 문제 빈출.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized open Korean classical book with brush and ink-stone beside it. RIGHT: a small abacus icon. Cream #F2EDE3 base + amber #C77B3D accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
